name: Nanfang Black Sesame Group Co., Ltd.
summary: Nanfang Black Sesame Group Co., Ltd. researches, develops, produces, and sells black sesame products in China. It offers black sesame pastes and beverages, selenium-enriched rice, snack food, and oatmeal products, as well as health series products. The company was formerly known as Guangxi Nanfang Foodstuff Group Stock Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Nanfang Black Sesame Group Co., Ltd. in April 2012. Nanfang Black Sesame Group Co., Ltd. was founded in 1984 and is headquartered in Nanning, China.
